1:9	identifier	"grammar"

3:19	newline	"\n"

4:8	string	"\"/demo/{slug}\""

5:1	annotation	"@layout"
5:9	identifier	"root"
5:13	comma	","
5:15	identifier	"demo"
5:19	newline	"\n"
6:1	annotation	"@css"
6:6	identifier	"default"
6:14	identifier	"page"
6:19	identifier	"forms"
6:24	newline	"\n"
7:1	newline	"\n"
8:1	identifier	"paths"
8:7	lbrace	"{"
8:8	newline	"\n"
9:3	arrow	"=>"
9:6	lbrace	"{"
9:8	identifier	"slug"
9:12	colon	":"
9:14	string	"\"starter\""
9:24	rbrace	"}"
9:25	newline	"\n"
10:1	rbrace	"}"
10:2	newline	"\n"
11:1	newline	"\n"
12:1	identifier	"act"
12:5	identifier	"Submit"
12:12	identifier	"POST"
12:17	string	"\"/demo/{slug}\""
12:31	newline	"\n"
13:1	newline	"\n"
14:1	identifier	"view"
14:6	lbrace	"{"
14:7	newline	"\n"
15:3	text	"<main>"
15:9	newline	"\n"
16:5	text	"<h1"
16:9	text	".title>"
16:16	lbrace	"{"
16:17	identifier	"slug"
16:21	rbrace	"}"
16:22	text	"</h1>"
16:27	newline	"\n"
17:5	text	"<form"
17:11	identifier	"g"
17:12	colon	":"
17:13	identifier	"post"
17:17	text	"="
17:18	lbrace	"{"
17:19	identifier	"Submit"
17:25	rbrace	"}"
17:26	text	">"
17:27	newline	"\n"
18:7	text	"<button>Save</button>"
18:28	newline	"\n"
19:5	text	"</form>"
19:12	newline	"\n"
20:3	text	"</main>"
20:10	newline	"\n"
21:1	rbrace	"}"
21:2	newline	"\n"
22:1	eof	""
